raw: 617-547-8300 SELECT SHOWS - The A.R.T. makes passes available to select performances of select shows. Availability will be determined 30 days before the start of each performance's run. After booking, you will receive an email confirmation with instructions on how to c ontact A.R.T. Ticket Services for your electronic tickets. NOTE: Black Swan is recommended for at least ages 14 and older and has content warnings for self-injury/harm, sex, haze, flashing lights/strobe, and loud sudden noises.
